tags.name: Val_Sts

tags.documentation: Device Confirmed Sts 0=Q off, 1=Q on, 2=Above LowerSP, 3=Below LowerSP, 4-7=same, in Manual
tags.expression:
CASE({[.]Val_Sts},
0,"Off",
1,"On",
2,"Pulse Off",
3,"Pulse On",
4,"Pulse Cont.",
5,"Turning Off",
6,"Turning On",
"Unknown")
